notes: Dual-algo regime-switching prop bot: Trend Pullback + VWAP Mean Reversion. Phase-aware everything (mode, MTF, exits, guardrails, sizing). 3-stage exits (bracket → BE → trail). Risk cap on qty (not stop). Min stop floor. Actual fill price for BE/Trail. Designed for Lucid 100K straight-to-funded.
